summary: All acceptance criteria are already implemented: lib/lock.sh provides lock_path, lock_exists, lock_acquire (with --force-lock support and PID writing), and lock_release (idempotent); karl.sh sources lock.sh, parses --force-lock, calls lock_acquire before the loop, and installs an EXIT trap to release the lock. All 12 tests in tests/lock.bats pass and shellcheck lib/*.sh exits 0.
